---
title: "Introduction to RStudio"
---

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" src="slides/intro-rstudio.html"></iframe>
```

[Slides in full screen](slides/intro-rstudio.html){target="_blank"} | [Download PDF slides](slides_pdf/intro-rstudio.pdf){download="intro-rstudio.pdf"}

::: {.callout-tip}
## Exercises
Go to the [task page](tasks/intro-rstudio-task.qmd) for the exercises.
:::

## Resources

- [R Studio user guide](https://docs.posit.co/ide/user/){target="_blank"}: A comprehensive guide to using RStudio, including tips and troubleshooting.
- [Create an RStudio project](https://docs.posit.co/ide/user/ide/guide/code/projects.html){target="_blank"}: R Studio user guide on how to create and manage projects.
- [RStudio cheat sheet](https://rstudio.github.io/cheatsheets/rstudio-ide.pdf){target="_blank"}: A reference for RStudio features, buttons, etc..
